title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: Google Cloud speakers argue that AI-native databases are critical infrastructure for agent systems, enabling context-aware automation through retrieval-augmented generation and multimodal interfaces. They highlight open standards like Model Context Protocol and agentic IDEs as key enablers for rapid, reliable agent deployment.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech makes the case that AI-native databases are core infrastructure for agent systems, supporting context-aware automation through retrieval-augmented generation and multimodal interfaces. The video covers semantic search, graph-based RAG, and natural language interfaces as the mechanisms that supply agents with relevant context. It frames open standards, specifically the Model Context Protocol, along with agentic IDEs, as the enablers for faster and more reliable agent deployment.
